item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Classic beef lasagna layered with rich ragù and creamy béchamel, served withwarm focaccia and a crisp bitter leaf salad. Radish crudité tossed inmustard vinaigrette on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Pulled chicken coated in smoky mild spicy agave BBQ sauce with caramelisedonions and mushrooms. Served with half roasted organic baked potatoes andtopped with fresh carrot salad with herbs and homemade apple vinegar. Creamyyoghurt ranch dressing on the side GREEN DISH: Pulled jackfruit coated in smoky mild spicy agave BBQ sauce with caramelisedonions and mushrooms. Served with half roasted baked potatoes and topped withcarrot salad with fresh herbs and apple cider vinegar. Yoghurt ranchdressing on the side

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Slow cooked pulled pork with crisp coleslaw and oven roasted potatoes, servedwith a bold and indulgent dirty aioli GREEN DISH: Slow seasoned pulled tofu with crisp coleslaw and oven roasted potatoes, servedwith a rich dirty aioli Lunch 11 a.m. — 1:30 p.m. Lunch 11 a.m. — 2 p.m. 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. Slagtehusgade 11, 2. sal DK-1715 København V CVR: 40909109 Kay Fiskers Pl. 102 300 København +45 31 10 05 58

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Cheeseburger with a juicy patty, melted cheese and satisfying crunch in everybite GREEN DISH: Vegetarian cheeseburger with a juicy plant based patty and melted cheese Lunch 11 a.m. — 1:30 p.m. Lunch 11 a.m. — 2 p.m. 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. Slagtehusgade 11, 2. sal DK-1715 København V CVR: 40909109 Kay Fiskers Pl. 102 300 København +45 31 10 05 58

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Crisp Mexican tacos filled with aromatic roasted beef tossed with beans, servedwith grilled padrón peppers, sweet corn, pickled red onions and fresh salsa,finished with jalapeños and coriander Greendish Crisp Mexican tacos filled with aromatic roasted tempeh tossed with beans,served with grilled padrón peppers, sweet corn, pickled red onions and freshsalsa, finished with jalapeños and coriander Lunch 11 a.m. — 1:30 p.m. Lunch 11 a.m. — 2 p.m. 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. Slagtehusgade 11, 2. sal DK-1715 København V CVR: 40909109 Kay Fiskers Pl. 102 300 København +45 31 10 05 58
